title: Sync. workflow across skopeo, buildah, and podman
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

> /kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Besides adding ***BIG FAT WARNING*** this commit updates the
containers-repo. logic to only (and properly) handle the `stable` image
(both version and `latest` tags).  This change was already discussed at
length with @TomSweeneyRedHat 

#### How to verify it

These changes cannot be easily tested as the workflow only executes from the master branch.  It must be verified manually after merge, by observing it's behavior under the "actions" tab of the GitHub WebUI.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

See also https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/10434

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

None
